description_long: This is a medium-sized paperback book with a visually striking front cover featuring a detailed, somber portrait of a bearded man with closed eyes, rendered in a painterly style. The book's cover is predominantly a mix of earthy tones, with a bold red band at the bottom containing additional text. The spine is a deep red color with white text running vertically, and the back cover is mostly white with blocks of text and a barcode at the bottom. The book appears to be of average thickness, with visible white pages along the sides. The overall condition suggests a standard, mass-market publication, likely intended for general readership. The book's materials and finish are typical of modern paperbacks, with a semi-glossy cover and matte paper pages.
description: A medium-sized paperback book with a painted portrait on the front cover, red spine, and white back with text and barcode.
description_view_0: The front cover displays a detailed painted portrait of a bearded man with closed eyes, with a red band at the bottom.
description_view_1: The right side shows the book's white pages and a partial view of the front cover's illustration.
description_view_2: The back cover is mostly white with blocks of text and a barcode at the bottom, showing the book's thickness.
description_view_3: The left side reveals the red spine with vertical white text and a partial view of the back cover.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a realistic, painterly portrait of a bearded man with closed eyes, rendered in warm, earthy tones. The style is expressive and emotive, focusing on the face and upper head, with soft brushwork and subtle shading. The background is muted, drawing attention to the central figure.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is deep red with vertically oriented white text, matching the color scheme of the front cover. There are no visible decorative patterns, but the text is clear and bold.
